summary: Iteration 26: Tested data export in admin panel and balie color tab switching optimization. All features working correctly. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: Admin export downloads JSON file successfully, all 5 color tabs (Fiberglass, Acrylic, Spruce, Thermo, WPC) switch instantly with images loading from API.

minor.issue: Cache-Control header set by backend (public, max-age=604800) is overridden by Cloudflare CDN to 'no-store, no-cache' in preview environment. This is expected infrastructure behavior, not a code bug.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Data export and balie color tabs fully working. Export endpoint at /api/admin/export returns JSON with all collections (settings, balia_products, balia_colors, etc). Balia bulk endpoint at /api/balia/bulk returns ~50 colors across 5 categories. Color tab switching is optimized with image preloading in BalieContext.js. Admin panel sidebar has СИСТЕМА group at bottom with Экспорт/Импорт tab (data-testid='admin-tab-data_migration'). Export button data-testid='export-btn'. Color tabs data-testid pattern: 'balie-color-tab-{category}'.

admin_export.details: Admin panel login works with admin/220066. Navigate to System → Export/Import tab. DataMigrationAdmin component renders correctly. Export button downloads JSON file (wm-group-export-YYYY-MM-DD.json) containing all collections.

balia_bulk_api.details: /api/balia/bulk returns 200 with colors array containing items across 5 categories: fiberglass (13), acrylic (7), spruce (13), thermo (15), wpc (1). Response time < 1s due to BulkCache.

color_tab_switching.details: All 5 color tabs (Kolory Fiberglass, Kolory Akrylowe, Drewno Swierkowe, Drewno Termiczne, Kompozyt WPC) switch instantly. Images load from /api/images/{id} endpoint. Preloading implemented in BalieContext.js.

image_caching.details: Backend ImageCache (200 items, 1h TTL) working. Images served with Cache-Control headers (CDN may override in preview). Non-existent images return 404.
